# Summary

Current Codex docs for repository, user, and admin skill locations.

# Key facts

- Codex scans `.agents/skills` in each directory from the current working directory up to the repo root.
- User-scope skills live in `~/.agents/skills`.
- The docs also call out `/etc/codex/skills` as the admin or system location.

# Refresh notes

- No public markdown source was found during this pilot; this cache is a normalized summary of the rendered docs page.
